title: Word Formation: The Power of Reading

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
Many people believe that reading is one of the most 1.1. _________ habits a young person can develop. Books open doors to worlds we could never visit, and they feed the 1.2. _________ of children who love inventing stories of their own. Scientists have shown that pupils who read 1.3. _________, rather than only now and then, build a much larger vocabulary than their classmates.

Reading also brings real 1.4. _________: it helps us understand other cultures and see life through different eyes. After a stressful day at school, a good story can be wonderfully 1.5. _________, slowing our thoughts and easing our worries.

Of course, not every book suits every reader. Beginners are often 1.6. _________ to finish a long novel at first, but teachers say that even the hardest pages bring steady 1.7. _________ in confidence. So the next time someone asks you to 1.8. _________ why reading matters, simply hand them a book.
